summary: On April 21–22, 2026, operators of Russia's "Rubicon" Center conducted strikes across multiple axes—Donbas, Krasny Liman, Sumy, and Belgorod—destroying 149 targets on the 22nd and setting a new daily record of 234 on the 21st, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, armored vehicles, and personnel. Ukrainian forces, particularly in the Krasnoarmiysk area, are attempting to hold positions north of Dobropillia by deploying large numbers of armored vehicles and equipment, which are being targeted by Russian FPV drone operators. Belarusian volunteer FPV crews from unit 1514, operating under Ukraine's HUR "Timur" unit, struck Russian positions on the Zaporizhzhia axis. Russian forces suffered losses from FPV drones, including the destruction of a TOS-1A MLRS after initial damage by a Bulava loitering munition, and the killing of soldiers attempting to assault on motorcycles or feign surrender. Ukrainian forces also experienced close calls, surviving FPV attacks in the Kostiantinivka direction, with drone detectors alerting them to incoming threats.
